headline: ZoomInfo, GoDaddy, Flywire, and Sprinklr Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after rising treasury yields and renewed Iran tensions hit the software sector.

headline: Infoblox and GoDaddy Support Open Standards for AI Agent Discovery, Identity and Verification
summary: DNS Infrastructure Leaders Back Complementary, DNS-based Approaches to Help Add Transparency to AI Agents Across the Open WebSANTA CLARA, Calif. and TEMPE, Ariz., May 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Infoblox, a leader in hybrid, multi-cloud networking and preemptive security, and GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), a global leader in domain registration and internet infrastructure, today announced support for complementary open standards designed to help AI agents identify, discover and verify one another a
